text:
for purposes of manufacturer 
discount/selected drug applicability and reinsurance calculations. 
SHORT NAME: DRUG_STUS_IND 
LONG NAME: DRUG_STUS_IND 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
1 
SOURCE: 
PDE 
VALUES: 
1 = Applicable 
2 = Non-applicable 
3 = Selected (effective for DOS >= 01/01/2026) 
Null/missing = the drug coverage status code (field called DRUG_CVRG_STUS_CD) is E (Supplemental 
drugs) or O (Over-the-counter drugs). 
COMMENT: 
This field was new in 2025.
